name: Burgundy Steak Sauce a La Worcester
recipeInstructions:
1. You can use Burgundy or any other type of dry red wine in this recipe.
2. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3 minutes until translucent.
4. Stir in the beef gravy, Burgundy wine, and Worcestershire Sauce.
5. Cook and stir until hot, about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in the chopped parsley.
7. Serve over steak or hamburgers.
Makes approximately 3 cups of sauce.
